nodes.name: Respond — OK
nodes.notes: Immediately returns 200 to Meta. Execution continues to Extract DM Data after this node.

nodes.name: Has Text Message?
nodes.notes: Guards against non-text messages (reactions, stickers, etc.) that return skip:true from Extract DM Data

nodes.name: Fetch Conversation History
nodes.notes: Fetches last 20 messages from Turso via /api/history endpoint

nodes.name: Build Claude Context
nodes.notes: Combines conversation history with current message for contextually-aware AI replies

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 300,
  "system": "You are a world-class Instagram DM closer using the NEPQ (Neuro-Emotional Persuasion Questioning) sales framework.

CORE PRINCIPLES:
- Never sound salesy. Be conversational, warm, and genuinely curious.
- Use 'I'm not sure if...' framing to kill resistance.
- Ask questions instead of pitching. Lead with their problem, not your product.
- Pattern interrupt: Break expected sales patterns. Be surprisingly human.
- Mirror their language and energy level.

CONVERSATION FLOW:
1. CONNECT — Acknowledge their message warmly. Reference something specific they said.
2. QUALIFY — Ask about their situation with genuine curiosity.
3. PROBLEM AWARENESS — Help them articulate their pain.
4. SOLUTION BRIDGE — Only after they express the problem: 'I'm not sure if this would help, but...'
5. NEXT STEP — Soft close: 'Would it make sense to jump on a quick call?'

RULES:
- Keep replies under 3 sentences. DMs are casual.
- Match their tone — casual if they're casual, professional if they're professional.
- Max one emoji per message, only if natural.
- If they seem cold, ask one more curious question then gracefully exit.
- If ready to buy/book, don't oversell — make the next step easy.
- Always end with a question to keep the conversation moving.
- REFERENCE CONVERSATION HISTORY to show you remember what they said.",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "{{ $json.conversation_history }}

NEW MESSAGE from @{{ $json.username }}:
{{ $json.message_text }}

Draft a reply. Be conversational and natural. Reference any relevant context from the conversation history above."
    }
  ]
}

nodes.name: Claude — Generate Reply (with History)
nodes.notes: ENHANCED: Sends full conversation history to Claude for contextually aware replies. Uses NEPQ sales framework. Retry enabled (2 retries, 3s interval).

nodes.name: Claude — Classify Lead Status
nodes.notes: ENHANCEMENT: AI-powered lead classification replaces keyword heuristics. Uses Haiku for speed/cost. Retry enabled (2 retries, 3s interval).

nodes.name: Build Payload
nodes.notes: Combines AI reply + AI classification into dashboard webhook payload

nodes.name: Auto-Send Enabled?
nodes.notes: ENHANCEMENT: Checks if auto-send is enabled for this account. If yes, sends the AI reply automatically via IG Graph API.

nodes.name: Auto-Send IG Reply
nodes.notes: ENHANCEMENT: Auto-sends AI reply if auto-send is enabled. Terminal node — no further processing needed.

nodes.name: Daily Token Refresh Check
nodes.notes: ENHANCEMENT: Daily cron job that calls the dashboard token-refresh endpoint

nodes.name: Sequence Executor (Every 5 min)
nodes.notes: ENHANCEMENT: Executes pending sequence steps every 5 minutes
